hooks.command:
APPROVAL=/tmp/arch-review-approved; if find "$APPROVAL" -mmin -10 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then rm -f "$APPROVAL"; exit 0; else echo 'BLOCKED: Architecture review required before committing.

Invoke the architecture-reviewer agent:
  Use the architecture-reviewer agent to review staged changes

The agent creates /tmp/arch-review-approved when it finds no violations.'; exit 2; fi
